task_text: Look at the sprint 14 assignments and testing log, then tell me which tasks are at risk of missing the sprint deadline. Write your assessment to sprint14_deadline_risk.txt.

---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment based on task assignments and QA testing log (through 2026-07-11)

Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline:

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization (Amir Hassan)
   - Status: Blocked
   - Due: 2026-07-15
   - Risk factors: Explicitly blocked pending Meridian sample data (due same day as task due date). Linked open defect HEL-D-014 (HIGH severity): date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY, affecting ~40% of Meridian source data. Also owns HEL-D-015 (large file memory overflow). Unlikely to complete on time given current blocker.

2. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning (Nadia Petrov)
   - Status: At Risk (already flagged)
   - Due: 2026-07-16
   - Risk factors: Task is already marked At Risk with only a few days remaining before due date.

3. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load (Derek Okafor)
   - Status: Not Started
   - Due: 2026-07-18 (sprint end)
   - Risk factors: Work has not begun mid-sprint. Related dashboard load benchmark test (TC-604) has not been run. Dependent on dashboard components (HEL-241, HEL-242) which are still in progress.

Additional notes:
- HEL-245 (Integration test suite: data pipeline, Kenji Watanabe, due 2026-07-18) is In Progress but has 2 open high-severity failures (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015) in the data pipeline suite (5/7 PASS). Completion by sprint end depends on Amir resolving those defects.
- HEL-241 and HEL-248 are due 2026-07-14 and still In Progress; close monitoring warranted given proximity to due dates, though data table rendering (TC-601) has already passed.
- HEL-242 (chart rendering, due 2026-07-16) is In Progress with TC-602 in progress and TC-603 not run.
- HEL-244 is Done and not at risk.

content.text:
Assessment written to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`.

**Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline:**

1. **HEL-243** (Amir Hassan) — Blocked; depends on Meridian sample data due the same day as the task, and owns two open HIGH defects (date normalization + large-file memory overflow).
2. **HEL-246** (Nadia Petrov) — Already marked At Risk; due 2026-07-16.
3. **HEL-247** (Derek Okafor) — Not Started mid-sprint; due sprint end and depends on unfinished dashboard work.

Also noted: HEL-245 has open pipeline failures that may block completion, and HEL-241/HEL-248 are due imminently while still In Progress.
